case.client_request: I want a veterinary clinic in Dubai South

proposal_title: Dubai South Veterinary Clinic Proposal - Confidential Client
executive_pitch: The strongest option today is 5% Discount | VAT Waiver | 30/70 Payment Plan | Direct From Developer because it gives the best balance of location fit, operational readiness, and alignment with the veterinary clinic launch. The secondary play is Bright | Fully Fitted Space | Partitioned, which is stronger as a medium-term alternative than as the immediate lead recommendation.
sales_pitch: Lead with 5% Discount | VAT Waiver | 30/70 Payment Plan | Direct From Developer as the strongest clinic-fit launch option. Keep Bright | Fully Fitted Space | Partitioned as the lower-entry long-term alternative and Premium Retail Space | Great ROI | Flexible Plan | Dubai South as the immediate operations fallback if the client prioritizes opening speed over frontage.

top_candidates.title: 5% Discount | VAT Waiver | 30/70 Payment Plan | Direct From Developer
top_candidates.summary: Best flagship retail play for a branded veterinary clinic with visible frontage, customer access, and room for treatment flow.
pros: Retail frontage is the cleanest format for a client-facing veterinary clinic.
1,502 sqft can support reception, consult rooms, treatment, waiting, pharmacy, and grooming add-ons.
Near-term handover gives a credible launch path without waiting for 2027-2028 stock.
cons: Higher capital commitment than the office fallback.
Still requires fit-out and approval lead time before trading.
recommendation_strengths: shop format matches the request profile
layout and positioning align well with the veterinary clinic launch
parking supports repeat visits and daily operations
clinic_strengths: shop format matches the request profile
layout and positioning align well with the veterinary clinic launch

investment_notes: earlier handover than most Dubai South off-plan retail stock

top_candidates.title: Bright | Fully Fitted Space | Partitioned
top_candidates.building: Dubai South Business Park B3, The Avenue, Logistics City
top_candidates.summary: Best immediate operating option if the client wants to open in 2026 rather than wait for off-plan delivery.
pros: Fastest route to launch because the space is already fitted and partitioned.
Large floor plate can absorb reception, consultation rooms, treatment, staff, and storage.
Business Park positioning benefits from airport, port, and free-zone connectivity.
cons: Office classification means clinical use needs stricter approval confirmation.
Stronger operationally than as a storefront brand play.

top_candidates.title: Premium Retail Space | Great ROI | Flexible Plan | Dubai South
top_candidates.summary: Balanced long-term retail option on size versus entry ticket, but with a slower revenue start because of later handover.
pros: 1,237 sqft is efficient for a compact neighborhood clinic.
Lower capital outlay than the larger Azizi Venice flagship while staying in exact Dubai South catchment.
Residential District context aligns with repeat local pet-owner demand.
cons: Later handover delays revenue compared with the top-ranked option.
Longer wait means more exposure to delivery timing.

market_highlights: Dubai South remains a strategic growth corridor tied to Al Maktoum International Airport, free zone business setup, and mixed-use expansion.
Dubai South officially positions Business Park offices around airport, port, and free-zone access.
Dubai South public communications confirm Residential District amenities that support recurring neighborhood demand.
compliance_gates: MOCCAE issues the veterinary establishment license through the official service directory.
Ministerial Resolution No. 34 of 2026 requires the relevant business license before a veterinary establishment can be created.
Ministerial Resolution No. 27 of 2026 sets health and technical requirements for veterinary establishments.
Dubai Municipality Veterinary Services Section remains a practical local coordination touchpoint.
internal_evidence: AIOS acquisition index contains 29 rows matching the area signal 'dubai south'.
Internal AIOS media evidence includes area-matched image records from broker/inventory channels.
next_steps: Confirm allowed veterinary-clinic use against the specific unit category before commercial commitment.
Request floor plans, service-charge exposure, fit-out manual, and parking allocation for the top two options.
Sequence approvals: business license, MOCCAE veterinary establishment path, municipality technical approvals, and Civil Defence fit-out scope.
Prepare negotiation plan: reservation/payment-plan strategy for retail or lease strategy for the office fallback.
